meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: Still 78 of 80 required events as of company's July 8, 2026 confirmation - unchanged since last run; 80th event still pending, topline readout guided 2H 2026

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 70.7% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold (up from 69.8%)

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (refinances $20B loan facility maturing 2027) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20%, or 30% if stock closed >=$175.50 on 5 of 10 days into the Q2 earnings window) opens after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; Q3 earnings triggers the largest single release (28%) around Oct/Nov; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026; Musk's 6.4B shares locked until Jun 12 2027
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date confirmation; bond spread trend

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap; lockup first-tranche window now ~2-4 weeks out

flags: Broad market risk-off: overnight escalation between US and Iran (CENTCOM strikes after IRGC attack on a commercial vessel in the Strait of Hormuz) has S&P futures -0.51% and Nasdaq 100 futures -1.24% premarket - both positions' moves look macro-driven, not company-specific.
SLS at 70.7% of NAV remains nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold; REGAL event count unchanged at 78/80 since last run - no new catalyst trigger.
Zero USD cash buffer persists - fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX lockup first-tranche window (post-Q2-earnings) now ~2-4 weeks out; no fresh negative credit/bond news found.
